escalation.rationale: Multiple active conflicts with US-Iran airstrikes day 90, Israeli expansion into Lebanon ordering evacuation of 14% of country, and NATO establishing new command centers on Russian borders.

ticker_items: US strikes Iranian military targets near Bandar Abbas on day 90
Israel orders evacuation of 14% of Lebanon south of Zahrani River
Ukraine appeals directly to Trump for more Patriot missile systems
Germany-Netherlands establish NATO command center in Baltics against Russia
North Korea tests AI-guided cruise missiles with autonomous navigation

eastern_europe.description: Ukraine attacked the port city of Sevastopol using Storm Shadow missiles according to Russian-occupied Crimea authorities.
Russian drone strikes targeted several Ukrainian regions according to Ukrainian officials.
Ukrainian forces attacked Russian-occupied Crimean port city using Storm Shadow missiles

middle_east.description: US Central Command forces shot down four Iranian attack drones and struck a ground control station about to launch a fifth drone.
Iran's Revolutionary Guard targeted a US airbase in response to US strikes, with location not specified.
US conducted airstrikes on Iranian military site near Strait of Hormuz
Israeli strike hit building in southern suburbs of Lebanese capital
Hezbollah drone strike killed one Israeli soldier and injured two others

today.incident: Hezbollah drone strike on Israeli forces

ukraine.text: Ukraine urgently needs additional Patriot missile systems as Russia intensifies ballistic missile attacks on Ukrainian cities
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: Ukrainian President

middle_east.text: It's got no anything. All they do is run around shooting each other
middle_east.speaker: Donald Trump
middle_east.title: US President

observers.description: President Xi Jinping reportedly planning first overseas trip of 2026 to North Korea as Beijing seeks to reinforce influence amid deepening North Korea-Russia ties. China-aligned APT groups documented targeting AI robotics in South Korea and conducting espionage in Venezuela and Gulf region.

Tested AI-guided tactical cruise missiles with autonomous navigation systems and multiple weapons systems including nuclear-capable cruise missiles. Constitutional changes stripped reunification language, signaling shift in strategy toward South Korea relations.

Germany is establishing joint NATO command center with Netherlands in the Baltics to command forces on eastern flank against Russia. The 1GNC tactical headquarters will take control of forces in Latvia and Estonia by mid-year.

Pakistan has deployed 8,000 troops, fighter jet squadron, and Chinese-made air defense system to Saudi Arabia under mutual defense treaty. The deployment began in early April to enhance Pakistani military presence in the region.

financial.notes: US imposed new sanctions to prevent Tehran from profiting from vessels transiting Strait of Hormuz amid ongoing Iran war.

update_log.text: US carries out airstrikes on Iranian military site near Strait of Hormuz on day 90 of Iran war
Israel issues evacuation order for all areas south of Zahrani River covering 14% of Lebanon
Germany and Netherlands announce joint NATO command center establishment in Baltics against Russia
Ukrainian President Zelenskyy makes direct appeal to Trump for additional Patriot missile systems
North Korea announces successful test of AI-guided tactical cruise missile
Iran's Revolutionary Guard reports targeting US airbase after US strikes Iranian drone facility near Strait of Hormuz
US Central Command shoots down four Iranian attack drones and strikes ground control station in Bandar Abbas
Ukraine uses Storm Shadow missiles against Russian-occupied Sevastopol according to Crimea authorities
Trump rejects Iranian peace terms as US-Iran conflict enters day 90
